verificationScope: The host runner fixes gpt-5.6-sol with ultra reasoning, isolates model and publisher worktrees, and mechanically verifies report structure plus the official arXiv announcement date and complete primary-New ID sets. Original titles and authors are read from official version-fixed pages under the evaluation contract but are not independently reproduced by the snapshot parser. The host cannot independently attest private service-side reasoning or make a benchmark-equivalence claim.
publicationRule: Publish only schema-1.4 editions using Daily arXiv rubric 3.0 whose three reports exactly match a stable host-fetched arXiv snapshot, contain identical run metadata and explicitly verified model selection, complete every score, score reason, audit, and natural-Japanese field, and document full-text review of every final top-ten paper.
